ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulation_time_series" (
  "time_index" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time series entry */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the simulation */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the hour */,
  "dst" INTEGER /* Daylight saving time flag (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "interval" INTEGER /* Time interval */,
  "interval_type" INTEGER /* Type of interval (e.g., fixed, variable) */,
  "simulation_days" INTEGER /* Number of simulation days */,
  "day_type" TEXT /* Type of day (e.g., SummerDesignDay) */,
  "environment_period_index" INTEGER /* Index of the environment period */,
  "warmup_flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the data is part of the warm-up period (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_index"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_time_series_day_type FOREIGN KEY ("day_type") REFERENCES day_types ("day_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_time_series_environment_period_index FOREIGN KEY ("environment_period_index") REFERENCES environment_periods ("environment_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_time_series_interval_type FOREIGN KEY ("interval_type") REFERENCES interval_types ("interval_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_details" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "start_time_index" INTEGER /* Starting time index of the simulation */,
  "end_time_index" INTEGER /* Ending time index of the simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_details_start_time_index FOREIGN KEY ("start_time_index") REFERENCES simulation_time_series ("time_index"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_details_end_time_index FOREIGN KEY ("end_time_index") REFERENCES simulation_time_series ("time_index")
)

CREATE TABLE "interval_types" (
  "interval_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interval type */,
  "interval_name" TEXT /* Name of the interval type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interval type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "day_types" (
  "day_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day type */,
  "day_name" TEXT /* Name of the day type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the day type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment_periods" (
  "environment_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if data was downloaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulation_details ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation file */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the simulation data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the simulation data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_files_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulation_details ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Data of the simulation result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation result */,
  "result_additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information for the simulation result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulation_details ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the simulation dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_versions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulation_details ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
